name: Maltego
description: Maltego is a visual link analysis and data mining platform for gathering OSINT and mapping relationships between entities. It uses Transforms to query data sources and build investigation graphs. The Transform Distribution Server (TDS) provides remote Transform execution via REST.

actions.name: Run Transform
actions.description: Execute a Maltego Transform against an input entity (IP, domain, email, hash, etc.) to discover related entities and relationships from configured data sources.

parameters.name: transform_id
parameters.description: The ID of the Transform to run

parameters.name: entity_value
parameters.description: The input entity value (e.g., an IP address, domain, email, or hash)

parameters.name: soft_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 12)

actions.name: List Transforms
actions.description: Retrieve a list of all available Transforms on the TDS server with their IDs, names, and descriptions.

actions.name: List Seeds
actions.description: Get the list of configured seed (Transform Distribution) endpoints on the TDS server.

actions.name: IP to Domains
actions.description: Standard Transform to discover domains associated with a given IP address through DNS resolution and reverse lookups.

parameters.name: entity_value
parameters.description: The IP address to resolve to domains

actions.name: Domain to IP
actions.description: Standard Transform to resolve a domain name to its IP address(es) through DNS resolution.

actions.name: Email to Domain
actions.description: Standard Transform to extract the domain from an email address for further investigation.

parameters.name: entity_value
parameters.description: The email address to extract domain from
